usr.query:
SELECT 
    manufacturing_order_number,
    product_name,
    product_quality,
    order_status,
    quantity_planned,
    quantity_produced,
    bom_component_name,
    bom_component_quantity as bom_compoenent_quantity,
    unit_of_measure,
    consumed_quantity,
    component_consumption_pct
FROM v_work_order_details
WHERE order_status IN ('ready', 'in_progress')
ORDER BY work_order_id, bom_component_id
